mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-UB-ServiceCore SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-UB-ServiceCore SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at ub-servicecore@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-UB-ServiceCore SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-UB-ServiceCore SIG maintains 18 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-UB-ServiceCore.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-UB-ServiceCore SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-UB-ServiceCore SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Hongwei Sun, Yiyu Yao, Changlong Chen. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
